title: Prune stale RnS incidents for absent sessions
description: Follow-up to TASK-175: limit_watcher.py dry-run still attempts probe resumes for stale historical incidents and opens new incidents from stale last_live entries even when those agents are no longer registered in durable status or present in live hcom. Add a bounded stale-state pruning path so RnS stops probing absent historical sessions while preserving real active incidents.
acceptance_criteria: limit_watcher prunes open incidents for agents absent from both durable status.json and current hcom snapshot before probe actions are computed.
limit_watcher filters last_live to durable-or-current hcom agents so stale helper names do not create new presumed-down incidents.
Focused tests cover pruning without suppressing durable registered agents, and dry-run no longer probes TASK-175's stale historical names.
Task uses only MAP_System files and does not edit external CommandCenterUI.
